# FemCoders Club

## About

FemCoders Club is a Spanish tech community and registered association founded on October 24, 2023, in Barcelona, Spain. Its mission is to empower women in technology by providing education, mentoring, networking and professional development resources. The community is open to women and people from underrepresented groups in tech across Spain and Latin America.

## Facts

- Founded: October 24, 2023
- Location: Barcelona, Spain
- Legal status: Registered association (Asociación)
- Language: Spanish
- Members: 1,500+
- Events organized: 40+
- Partner companies: 30+
- Focus areas: web development, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, React, artificial intelligence, open source, women in tech, diversity in technology

## Founders

FemCoders Club was co-founded by six women:

1. Irina Ichim — Fullstack Software Developer, AI Specialist, Backend Java Mentor
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/irina-ichim-desarrolladora

2. Ana Lucía Silva Córdoba — Master in Big Data & Data Science, Fullstack Developer, Tech Trainer, DonaTIC 2024 award winner
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ana-lucia-silva-cordoba

3. Elvia Benedith — Full-stack Web Developer and Civil Engineer, Pokecode
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elvia-benedith

4. Silvina Lucero Calderón — Full Stack Web Developer, QA Functional Tester
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/silvina-lucero

5. Liliana Dalmarco — Fullstack Developer, Scrum Master, Project Manager
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lilianadalmarco

6. Isadora Matias — Full Stack Developer, Designer, Visual Communication
   LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isadoramatias/

## Topics

FemCoders Club publishes technical content and organizes events on the following topics:

- Women in technology and diversity in tech
- Web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React)
- JavaScript fundamentals, ES Modules, event loop, closures, design patterns, data structures
- CSS layouts, animations, accessibility, responsive design, performance
- Artificial intelligence and AI tools for developers
- Open source contribution (Decidim, Ruby on Rails ecosystem)
- Career development for women in tech
- Civic technology and digital participation

## Partners and Collaborators

Strategic partners: InfoJobs, Glovo
Collaborating organizations: NTT DATA, HackBarna, SheHub, Le Wagon, El Canòdrom, PokeCode, FactoriaF5, Adevinta, Factorial HR, Criteo, Dynatrace, Codurance, Semrush, SeatCode, Extraordinary
